sound/vo/medic_activatecharge02.mp3.transcript: Ready for ze charge, Herr Doktor.

sound/vo/medic_activatecharge03.mp3.transcript: Now is ze time, Herr Doktor.

sound/vo/medic_autocappedcontrolpoint03..transcript: I am prepared to do vatever it takes!

sound/vo/medic_autocappedintelligence01..transcript: How embarrassing. Zey let a man of science escape with ze papers!

sound/vo/medic_autocappedintelligence03..transcript: Vere are your precious papers now, Dummkopfs?

sound/vo/medic_autodejectedtie02.mp3.transcript: Anyvun still alive has let me down!

sound/vo/medic_cartgoingbackoffense02.mp.transcript: Vhy is ze cart moving backvards?

sound/vo/medic_cartstaycloseoffense01.mp.transcript: Everyvun, stay close to zhe cart!

sound/vo/medic_cartstaycloseoffense02.mp.transcript: Do not leave zhe cart, dummkopfs!

sound/vo/medic_cartstopitdefense01.mp3.transcript: Everyone, we must stop zhat bomb!

sound/vo/medic_cartstoppedoffense02.mp3.transcript: Who stopped pushing zhe cart?! I want names!

sound/vo/medic_cartstoppedoffense03.mp3.transcript: Vhy is no one else pushing zhis cart?!

sound/vo/medic_cloakedspyidentify06.mp3.transcript: Ze Spy is a double agent!

sound/vo/medic_hat_taunts01.mp3.transcript: Oh ho, your awful hat, it's killing me! Haha!

sound/vo/medic_hat_taunts02.mp3.transcript: In my medical opinion, zhat hat looks ridiculous. Here's a second opinion: YOU'RE DEAD! Haha!

sound/vo/medic_hat_taunts03.mp3.transcript: Zhe patient died, but sadly, his terrible hat lives on!

sound/vo/medic_hat_taunts04.mp3.transcript: Confidentially doctor-to-patient, that is a STUPID HAT!

sound/vo/medic_helpmecapture02.mp3.transcript: I need help with zis point! Schnell!

sound/vo/medic_helpmedefend02.mp3.transcript: Must I defend zis point myself?!

sound/vo/medic_item_birdhead_domination0.transcript: I have a bird head, you're dominated!" [sotto voce] "Ve're bozh having a bad day.

sound/vo/medic_item_birdhead_round_start.transcript: I experimented on my own head! (laughs maniacally)
Zhe bird head is pure agony! (laughs manically)
It's a bird! It's a head! It's a bird head! (laughs)
Bird head was a bad choice! (screams)

sound/vo/medic_item_birdhead_uber01.mp3.transcript: I am zhe angry bird god of zhe Badlands! Fear me!

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_cart_push04.mp.transcript: Evilly: "Keep pushing." Normally: "Vhy don't you push?"

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_cart_stopped01.transcript: Normally: "Who stopped pushing zhe cart?" Evilly: "Zhis is your fault!"

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_domination01.m.transcript: I'm of two minds about zhis. Both are-- pretty good with it.

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_idle01.mp3.transcript: Evilly: "Do you ever worry you might be going mad!?" Normally: "Well, not worry. I mean, I'm not up at night about it."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_idle02.mp3.transcript: Evilly: "Do you ever zhink zhat you might be going mad?" Normally: "Oh, all zhe time. I don't zhink it's anyzhing to worry about."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_idle03.mp3.transcript: Evilly: "Redrum, redrum!" Normally: "Red- Oh, I just got zhat. Very clever."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_kill_assist01..transcript: Normally: "Ve did it!" Evilly: "I did it." Normally: "Eh, vhatever."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_round_start01..transcript: Normally: "Let's do zhis, my friends!" Evilly: "Kill zhem all." Normally: "Shh, it's enough!"

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_round_start02..transcript: Normally: "I'm ready, my friends." Evilly: "Kill all your friends." Normally: "Ooh, good idea."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_round_start03..transcript: Normally: "I'm ready!" Evilly: "Kill zhem all." Normally: "Also, I must kill you all."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_round_start04..transcript: Normally: "I cannot vait (nervous giggle)" Evilly: "And neizher can I."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_round_start05..transcript: Evilly: "Kill zhem, kill zhem all." Normally: "Hm, zhat does sound like fun."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_round_start06..transcript: Evilly: "Kill zhem all." Normally: "Hm. Are you sure?" Evilly: "Yes." Normally: "Vell, I'm convinced."

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_round_start07..transcript: Evilly: "Zhey all zhink you're crazy." Normally: "Vhat? I'll show zhem!"

sound/vo/medic_item_secop_uber01.mp3.transcript: Normally: "Ve are invincible!" Evilly: "Yes, ve are."

sound/vo/medic_item_zombiebird_got_brief.transcript: Archimedes: "Bwarrrr, stole the briefcase! Raawk!" Medic: "Shh shh shh!"

sound/vo/medic_item_zombiebird_jarate01..transcript: Archimedes: "Bwark, that's jarate!" Medic: [sad voice] "Yes, it is."

sound/vo/medic_item_zombiebird_mvm_go_up.transcript: Archimedes: "Rrrooowl, upgrade station! Raawk!" Medic: "Ah. Yes."

sound/vo/medic_item_zombiebird_mvm_win01.transcript: Medic: "Ve did it! Haha!" Archimedes: "Rraaaaa, kill your friends!" Medic: "Ah yes, I almost forgot."

sound/vo/medic_item_zombiebird_on_fire01.transcript: Archimedes: "Rraaa, we're on fire!" Medic: "Yes, I know!"

sound/vo/medic_item_zombiebird_round_sta.transcript: Archimedes: "Bwarr." Medic: "Shh." Archimedes: "Raaaarl." Medic: "Shh shh shh!" Archimedes: "Kill them all..." Medic: "That's enough!"
Archimedes: "Bwaaarrrl, dead by dawn!" Medic: "Shh, silence!".
Archimedes: "Bwaaarrrl, Archimedes wants brains!" Medic: "Thank you, Archimedes."
Archimedes: "Bwaaarrrl, Archimedes wants brains!" Medic: "Yes, Archimedes wants all the brains, doesn't he?"

sound/vo/medic_item_zombiebird_sf13_cart.transcript: Archimedes: "Bwark, push the dead man!" Medic: "I'm trying..."
Archimedes: "Bwaaarl, send him to hell!" Medic: "Ah, yes."

sound/vo/medic_jeers02.mp3.transcript: Iz zere a point to your lives?

sound/vo/medic_jeers03.mp3.transcript: My skill is VASTED on zis team!

sound/vo/medic_jeers08.mp3.transcript: Velcome to the 've lose vonce again'-fest.

sound/vo/medic_jeers11.mp3.transcript: From now on, losing is verboten!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_bomb_upgrade01.mp3.transcript: Zhe bomb carrier is looking angry!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_bomb_upgrade02.mp3.transcript: Zhe bomb carrier is getting angrier!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_encourage_upgrade02.m.transcript: Get to an Upgrade Station, schnell!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_get_upgrade02.mp3.transcript: I feel like a million Deutschmarks!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_get_upgrade04.mp3.transcript: Oh, I am going to murder so many robots.

sound/vo/medic_mvm_loot_godlike03.mp3.transcript: Gott in Himmel, it's vunderful. It's more zhan vunderful, it's- it's Perfekt! (gleeful laughter)

sound/vo/medic_mvm_loot_rare01.mp3.transcript: Oh, now zhis is a rare piece!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_mannhattan_gate_atk02.transcript: Zhe robots are attacking zhe gate!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_mannhattan_gate_take0.transcript: Zhe robots have taken zhe gate!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_stand_alone01.mp3.transcript: (Laughs) It's just you and me, robots!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_tank_deploy01.mp3.transcript: Zhe Tank is dropping a bomb!

sound/vo/medic_mvm_taunt01.mp3.transcript: Oh, I vill tear you apart, bolt by bolt!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_attack03.mp3.transcript: I vill heal you! Attack ze vizard!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_badmagic04.mp3.transcript: Haha! Ooh! I have no head!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_badmagic07.mp3.transcript: Oh ho hoh! I have been in zhe wrong profession. I must learn zhis magic!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_badmagic10.mp3.transcript: Uhh. Uh-oh. Alright, zhis is actually really bad.

sound/vo/medic_sf12_badmagic11.mp3.transcript: My-my blood is entirely out of my body. Vhat a curious feeling!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_badmagic12.mp3.transcript: Wuh ho ho! Vhat a curious sensation!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_bombinomicon01.mp3.transcript: Hoh! Zhat book certainly seems angry!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_bombinomicon02.mp3.transcript: Uh, hello! Magic book? Do you still have Demoman's eye? I'll trade you a heart for it!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_bombinomicon03.mp3.transcript: Hoh! Zhat book is full of bombs!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_bombinomicon05.mp3.transcript: Woo! What is zhat book doing?

sound/vo/medic_sf12_goodmagic03.mp3.transcript: I am coming for you, vizard!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_goodmagic04.mp3.transcript: Ooh. I must learn how to do zhat.

sound/vo/medic_sf12_seeking02.mp3.transcript: Vizard! Zhe sooner you come out, the sooner ve can kill you!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_seeking03.mp3.transcript: Come out, Merasmus! Ve have much to discuss!

sound/vo/medic_sf12_seeking04.mp3.transcript: Come out, Merasmus! Nothing vill happen to you. I svear!" (breathless laughter) "I can't...ve're going to kill you! (more laughter)

sound/vo/medic_sf12_taunts04.mp3.transcript: Oh. Magic. Ghosts! Oho! Zhis is so much fun!

sound/vo/medic_sf13_cart_forward02.mp3.transcript: Push zat old man to hell!

sound/vo/medic_sf13_influx_big02.mp3.transcript: Today!! I am a God!! (maniacal laughter)

sound/vo/medic_sf13_magic_reac03.mp3.transcript: I can't take any more of zis insanity!

sound/vo/medic_sf13_magic_reac07.mp3.transcript: I can't take it any more!

sound/vo/medic_sf13_midnight06.mp3.transcript: Ze clock has struck! Schnell, schnell!

sound/vo/medic_specialcompleted02.mp3.transcript: Ze healing is not as revarding as ze hurting.

sound/vo/medic_specialcompleted03.mp3.transcript: Ze healing leaves little time for ze hurting.

sound/vo/medic_specialcompleted08.mp3.transcript: Did ze Fräuleins have zeir Mittelschmerz?

sound/vo/medic_standonthepoint05.mp3.transcript: Standing near ze point does nussing; get on ze point, dummkopf!

sound/vo/medic_trade_taunts03.mp3.transcript: You vant zis? ZEN TRADE ME FOR IT!

sound/vo/medic_weapon_taunts01.mp3.transcript: Heh ha! Your silly clown veapon is making a mockery of zis var!

sound/vo/medic_weapon_taunts02.mp3.transcript: Ho ho! What did you think you are going to kill with zhat?

sound/vo/medic_weapon_taunts03.mp3.transcript: Hahahaha! Ha I'm- I'm sorry- I'm sorry, I- I'm not laughing at you, it's just your- your veapon! Hahaha!

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_taunt_admire.transcript: Zhat vas fun! Heh ha ha!

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_taunt_cong_f.transcript: (whispered intense singing) "I kick my leg out. Oh I am so good, ja!"

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_taunt_dosi_f.transcript: Ha ha ha! Ha ha ha!
Whoo hoo hoo! Ooh, do-si-do your partner!
Allemande Left! Allemande Right! Ha hah!
Hoo ha ha! I love it!

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_taunt_head_e.transcript: Ooh ho hah ho hah oh!
Ooh ha ha! I zhink I have a concussion, haha!
Ooh! I zhink I have a concussion, hehe!

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_taunt_int_22.transcript: Ho ho hoh! Hoo hoo! Oh, it's on!

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_taunt_kill_2.transcript: ...hmm ha ha ha! Yes! I killed you, alright!

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_trade_04.mp3.transcript: Vhat do you think of zis? Ha ha!

sound/vo/taunts/medic/medic_trade_11.mp3.transcript: I found zis, inside a patient. Ha ha!

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunt_kill_22.mp3.transcript: ...hmm ha ha ha! Yes! I killed you, alright!

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunts01.mp3.transcript: Hold still, Schweinhund, zis vill only sting for a moment.

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunts02.mp3.transcript: Eins, zwei, drei... Ugh, I do not think we brought enough body bags.

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunts05.mp3.transcript: I'm going to saw zrough your bones!

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunts06.mp3.transcript: (Dark, low voice) "I healed zuh man who vill kill you!"

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunts12.mp3.transcript: Come over here. I promise I vill heal you!

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunts13.mp3.transcript: All I can tell you about zis next procedure is zat it vill be... excruciating!

sound/vo/taunts/medic_taunts14.mp3.transcript: Vould you like a second opinion? You are also ugly!
